summary: Retest of profile userId-scoping and injury_preview isolation fixes. All 12 backend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Registered test_iso@theprogram.app / IsoTest999 as fresh user; upserted user_a profile with name=TEST_Athlete_UserA
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both fixes confirmed working: (1) GET/POST /api/profile now returns 404 for fresh users (not default user profile). (2) injury_preview for fresh user correctly shows SI Joint in addedInjuries (not alreadyExisting) with Deadlift restricted. (3) user_a and user_b have isolated profiles with different userIds. (4) user_b cannot see user_a profile updates.
